description_long: This is a vintage wooden storage box with reinforced metal edges and a weathered appearance, suggesting it was used for industrial or commercial purposes. The box is marked with bold black lettering reading 'ANHEUSER-BUSCH INC. PROPERTY ST. LOUIS, MO.' on two opposite sides, indicating its origin and ownership. The top surface features a large, colorful Budweiser logo with an eagle and 'BUDWEISER' text, while the shorter sides display the Anheuser-Busch 'A' and eagle emblem, along with the text 'SINCE 1876.' Each short side has a rectangular cut-out handle for easy lifting. The box appears to have a removable flat lid, secured by metal brackets at the corners. The overall finish is matte and rough, with visible wood grain and signs of age.
description: A vintage wooden Anheuser-Busch storage box with metal reinforcements, bold branding, and cut-out side handles. The box features a removable flat lid and prominent Budweiser and company logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'ANHEUSER-BUSCH INC. PROPERTY ST. LOUIS, MO.' in bold black letters and the top Budweiser logo partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'SINCE 1876' text, the Anheuser-Busch 'A' and eagle logo, and a rectangular cut-out handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same company branding and visible metal corner brackets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with 'SINCE 1876,' the Anheuser-Busch emblem, and a matching cut-out handle.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, warehouse, or stackable in storage areas
